ideation: This sequence mimics the rowing motion of a motorboat, focusing on the rhythmic back-and-forth movement of the arms.  The arms will move in a coordinated manner, simulating the pulling of oars.  I'll use a 4-frame sequence to capture the key phases of the rowing action.  The robot's lack of elbows will be compensated by varying joint angles to create a believable rowing motion. The left and right arms will move in opposition to each other, creating a natural rowing rhythm.

frames.beat: arms push forward, ready to row
arms pull back, rowing with effort
arms push forward again, the boat glides
arms pull back, a steady rhythm established rhythm established rhythm established rhythm established rhythm established rhythm established rhythm
